target_property: OEM or tested max dynamic bending moments, torsion parameters, and frame rail vertical jounce/rebound load limits at GVWR-relevant states
system_context: L2 FEA of frame under concentrated HV battery mass (ANL-DECON-MASS-BIAS / PROP-BATTERY-AFT)
inference_forbidden_reason: Structural load envelopes cannot be safely invented from GVWR marketing tables alone.
engineering_risk: Underspecified FEA → false safety; overconservative guess → blocked packaging — either way not L1.

best_source_tiers.source_class: OEM fastener & structural standards / frame engineering bulletins
Published frame engineering data if configuration-applicable

honesty_notes: Hours-saved / blocking-level metadata are management estimates — not admitted as engineering truth.
Until acquired, L2 status remains SIMULATION_REQUIRED with UNKNOWN OEM load inputs.
Deferred — does not authorize physical battery integration testing.
